/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.1.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=14.6 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/project.dir/Alg1.cpp.o CMakeFiles/project.dir/Alg2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/project.dir/Alg3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/project.dir/Alg4.cpp.o CMakeFiles/project.dir/GlobalData.cpp.o CMakeFiles/project.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/project.dir/Utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/project.dir/IO.cpp.o -o project
